nasb.text: Corresponding to the openings of the chambers which were toward the south was an opening at the head of the way, the way in front of the wall toward the east, as one enters them.

esv.text: as were the entrances of the chambers on the south. There was an entrance at the beginning of the passage, the passage before the corresponding wall on the east as one enters them.

cnv.text: 南邊的房子的門，也與北面的一樣。在東面夾道的開端，與牆相對的地方，有門可以進入。

ccb.text: 厢房的东面通道的前端有一道门。
